items.title: Gelof leads Israel past Netherlands in 6-2 victory to end WBC on a high note

items.summary_en: Third baseman Jake Gelof was the hero for Team Israel (2-2) in its final 2026 WBC game, a 6-2 win over the Netherlands (1-3). With the score tied 2-2 in the top of the sixth and bases loaded with two outs, Gelof drove a grounder through the left-infield gap to give Israel a 4-2 lead.
items.title_ja: Gelofが活躍、IsraelがNetherlandsを6-2で下しWBC有終の美

items.title: Baseball Will Tell You Where It Needs To Grow

Captain Vinnie Pasquantino called the Cinderella run proof of why the WBC should exist, noting Italian fans watched games on TV and front pages of newspapers. Ian Curtis analyzes the key takeaways from the upset victory.
